meta.title: Preview Fixture
meta.subtitle: Dev-only kitchen sink for every figure kind
meta.description: A dev-only content fixture exercising every registered figure kind — static image + lightbox, event-study explorer, concept map, interactive grouped bar, and diverging coefficient bar — plus the abstract-network hero scene. Excluded from listPapers() via the "_" slug prefix, so it never appears in the future gallery.

sections.title: Every Figure Kind, One Page
body: This paper does not exist. papers/_preview.json exists purely so every registered figure component — StaticFigure, EventStudyExplorer, ConceptMapDiagram, and InteractiveGroupedBar — plus the abstract-network hero scene can be exercised and visually checked across all four theme presets without touching the AlphaQubit regression baseline.
Slugs starting with an underscore load normally but are excluded from listPapers(), so this fixture is reachable at ?paper=_preview (from Phase 6 onward) but never listed in the public gallery.

sections.title: Cribbed From The Paper PDF
body: StaticFigure renders an image, a caption, an optional credit line, and a click-to-open lightbox (fixed dark scrim, Escape or scrim-click to close). The image path is resolved via withBase('papers', slug, figure.src) using the slug threaded down through FigureRenderProvider — never a bare /papers/... path, which would 404 once the site is deployed under the /paperViz/ base path.

sections.title: Stylized Event-Study Explorer
body: Twelve leads/lags around a stylized treatment date, reference period pinned at t = -1, confidence intervals widening at both tails. Hover or tab to any marker for its coefficient and interval.

sections.title: Concept Map With Mixed Signs
body: Six nodes across three columns, mixed positive/negative/neutral edge signs, and one dashed moderating edge — rendered here on a dark (inverse) panel to check the negative-edge legibility across theme presets, especially Cosmic Slate.

sections.title: Interactive Grouped Bar
body: InteractiveGroupedBar (renamed from PerformanceMetricDiagram in Phase 4) is category-switchable and validated against a registered props schema in the loader — categories and series both require at least one entry.

sections.title: Diverging Coefficient Bar
body: CoefficientBar renders signed panel-regression coefficients as a grouped diverging bar chart around a zero baseline — categories are outcome variables, series are horizons. Negative estimates extend below the baseline; significance stars are derived from each cell's p-value and the exact p rides the hover/focus tooltip.

authors.heading: Not A Real Paper
authors.subheading: This content exists purely to exercise every figure kind for visual QA.
authors.footnote: Excluded from listPapers() — never shown in the gallery.

footer.blurb: Dev-only content fixture — excluded from the paper gallery via the "_" slug prefix convention.
